title: Discord Bot Controlled News Website
summary: A simple news website controlled by a Discord bot. Allowing the author to post news articles directly from Discord, which are then displayed on the website. The bot also provides commands for managing the news content.

title: Minimal Electrical Power System
summary: A CircuitJS1 simulation of a CubeSat's power subsystem modeling battery charge/discharge cycles. The system includes a solar panel, a battery, and a load. The simulation demonstrates the power flow and management within the CubeSat's electrical power system.

title: Shamirs Secret Sharing
summary: This project is a web-based implementation of Shamir's Secret Sharing (SSS). It allows users to split text or images into multiple "shares". To recover the original secret, a minimum number of shares must be combined.
